expressions.notes: 개인적이다 = to be personal; to be private

expressions.english: a problem exists; there is a problem

expressions.notes:
중요하다 = to be important
중요한 is the adjective form of 중요하다.
어려운 is the adjective form of 어렵다.

expressions.english: to take care of a problem
expressions.notes: 처리하다 = to take care of + N

expressions.english: A problem has appeared.; We have a problem.
expressions.notes: 생기다 = to come into being; to be created; to appear; to be formed

이 = this
어렵다 = to be difficult

expressions.english: This is an important matter, so listen carefully.

expressions.korean: 시험 문제가 너무 어려워서 다 못 풀었어요.
expressions.english:
The questions on the exam were too difficult, so I couldn't solve all of them.
The exam was too difficult, so I couldn't finish it.

expressions.korean: 그건 개인적인 문제라 말씀드릴 수가 없네요.
expressions.english: That is a personal matter, so I cannot tell you.
expressions.notes:
개인적인 is the adjective form of 개인적이다.
말씀드리다 = (polite) to talk; to say; to speak; to tell

expressions.korean: 핸드폰에 문제가 있는 것 같아요, 자꾸 꺼져요.
expressions.english: I think there is a problem with my phone. It keeps turning off.
expressions.notes:
핸드폰 = mobile phone
꺼지다 = N + turns off

expressions.korean: 저는 수학 문제 푸는데 시간이 너무 오래 걸려요.
expressions.english: It takes too much time for me to solve math problems.
expressions.notes:
수학 = math
시간 = time; hour
오래 = for a long time, a long time
-는 데(에) 시간이 걸리다 = to take (a certain amount of) time in + V-ing

expressions.korean: 그 사람은 문제를 해결하려고 하지 않고 피하려고만 해요.
expressions.english: That person never tries to solve the problem and only tries to avoid it.
